title: lagenophora sublyrata
intro: Lagenophora sublyrata, also known as Groundsel Daisy, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its yellow flowers and daisy-like appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lagenophora sublyrata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Lagenophora sublyrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
